question: Is this redox-active molecule a viable nonaqueous redox-flow-battery catholyte, and what should I measure next?

required.name: cycling_stability
required.why: capacity fade over cycles decides real viability

required.name: reference_match
required.why: compare against known catholytes before committing

context: Screening a new dialkoxyarene-type redoxmer for a nonaqueous redox-flow battery.
